title: George-based Schiefner and Sundelson set for SA Amateur showdown
description: GOLF NEWS - Judd Sundelson and Morris...
bodyText:
[{"type":"contributor","text":"Lali Stander on behalf of GolfRSA","contributorName":"Lali Stander on behalf of GolfRSA","contributorDate":"Friday, 30 January 2026, 08:44"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Morris Schiefner was pushed to the limit in his quarter-final against former GolfRSA No.1 Ivan Verster."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GOLF NEWS - Judd Sundelson and Morris Schiefner (from Fancourt) emerged from a gripping day of quarter-final and semi-final match play at Pretoria Country Club to secure their places in the final of the 2026 South African Amateur Championship.","html":"GOLF NEWS - Judd Sundelson and Morris Schiefner (from Fancourt) emerged from a gripping day of quarter-final and semi-final match play at Pretoria Country Club to secure their places in the final of the 2026 South African Amateur Championship."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sundelson continued the momentum he built on Thursday, when he blitzed the front nine to reach the quarter-finals, with another authoritative display on Friday morning."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Trailing England’s Ethan Roos by three holes through the turn, the South African birdied the 10th before flipping the match on its head with a decisive run from the 12th hole.","html":"Trailing England’s Ethan Roos by three holes through the turn, the South African birdied the 10th before flipping the match on its head with a decisive run from the 12th hole."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sundelson won five holes in succession, taking the 12th and 13th with pars before rolling in a birdie on the 14th. A bogey on the 15th was still enough to claim the hole after Roos made triple bogey, and the Houghton golfer sealed a 3&2 victory with a steady par on the 16th to advance to the semi-finals.","html":"Sundelson won five holes in succession, taking the 12th and 13th with pars before rolling in a birdie on the 14th. A bogey on the 15th was still enough to claim the hole after Roos made triple bogey, and the Houghton golfer sealed a 3&2 victory with a steady par on the 16th to advance to the semi-finals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The afternoon semi-final against Ryan Melville, who eliminated Minjun Heo 1-up in the quarter-finals, proved a far sterner test.","html":"The afternoon semi-final against Ryan Melville, who eliminated Minjun Heo 1-up in the quarter-finals, proved a far sterner test."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sundelson turned the match 1-up, only for Melville to square matters with a par on the 11th. The pair traded hole wins over the next two and remained all square heading into the closing stretch.","html":"Sundelson turned the match 1-up, only for Melville to square matters with a par on the 11th. The pair traded hole wins over the next two and remained all square heading into the closing stretch."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The decisive moment came on the 17th, where Melville dropped a shot to hand Sundelson a crucial advantage. They halved the 18th, allowing Sundelson to close out a tense 1-up victory and secure his place in the final.","html":"The decisive moment came on the 17th, where Melville dropped a shot to hand Sundelson a crucial advantage. They halved the 18th, allowing Sundelson to close out a tense 1-up victory and secure his place in the final."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"On the other side of the draw, Schiefner was pushed to the limit in his quarter-final against former GolfRSA No.1 Ivan Verster."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The German won the 14th with a birdie, but Verster kept the pressure on by birdieing the 17th to force extra holes. Schiefner held his nerve, holing a critical par on the first playoff hole to win on the 19th and advance.","html":"The German won the 14th with a birdie, but Verster kept the pressure on by birdieing the 17th to force extra holes. Schiefner held his nerve, holing a critical par on the first playoff hole to win on the 19th and advance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"That set up a semi-final against 16-year-old Schalk van Ettinger, who had edged Jonathan Wilsenach 1-up in the quarter-finals. The Randpark teenager showed remarkable composure, drawing first blood with a par and claiming the fourth and sixth holes, but Schiefner responded by winning three holes in succession to stay 1-up through 12.","html":"That set up a semi-final against 16-year-old Schalk van Ettinger, who had edged Jonathan Wilsenach 1-up in the quarter-finals. The Randpark teenager showed remarkable composure, drawing first blood with a par and claiming the fourth and sixth holes, but Schiefner responded by winning three holes in succession to stay 1-up through 12."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van Ettinger struck again by winning the 13th and 15th in a spirited display, but Schiefner’s experience at the top level proved decisive. Each time van Ettinger applied pressure down the homestretch, the German answered immediately, eventually closing the match 2&1 with a par on the 17th to book his place in the final.","html":"Van Ettinger struck again by winning the 13th and 15th in a spirited display, but Schiefner’s experience at the top level proved decisive. Each time van Ettinger applied pressure down the homestretch, the German answered immediately, eventually closing the match 2&1 with a par on the 17th to book his place in the final."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The stage is now set for a high-stakes showdown in the 36-hole final. With a coveted trophy and a place in the field for the 115th Investec South African Open Championship on the line, the champion will be the player who best handles the occasion after a week defined by momentum swings, pressure moments and fine margins.","html":"The stage is now set for a high-stakes showdown in the 36-hole final. With a coveted trophy and a place in the field for the 115th Investec South African Open Championship on the line, the champion will be the player who best handles the occasion after a week defined by momentum swings, pressure moments and fine margins."},{"type":"image_with_caption","text":"Houghton’s Judd Sundelson will go head-to-head with Morris Schiefner in the 2026 South African Amateur Championship 36-hole final at Pretoria Country Club. Photos: Supplied","imageUrl":"https://cms.groupeditors.com//media/1/1///498043c5-941e-4a84-8351-83f13c3f5cfa.jpg","caption":"Houghton’s Judd Sundelson will go head-to-head with Morris Schiefner in the 2026 South African Amateur Championship 36-hole final at Pretoria Country Club. Photos: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Semi-finals results","html":"Semi-finals results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Judd Sundelson beat Ryan Melville 1-upMorris Schiefner (GER) beat Schalk van Ettinger 2&1","html":"
  • Judd Sundelson beat Ryan Melville 1-up
  • Morris Schiefner (GER) beat Schalk van Ettinger 2&1
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Quarter-finals results","html":"Quarter-finals results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Judd Sundelson beat Ethan Roos (ENG) 3&2Ryan Melville beat Minjun Heo 1-upMorris Schiefner (GER) beat Ivan Verster (19th hole)Schalk van Ettinger beat Jonathan Wilsenach 1-up","html":"
  • Judd Sundelson beat Ethan Roos (ENG) 3&2
  • Ryan Melville beat Minjun Heo 1-up
  • Morris Schiefner (GER) beat Ivan Verster (19th hole)
  • Schalk van Ettinger beat Jonathan Wilsenach 1-up
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"See the scores here.","html":"See the scores here."}]

images.alt: George-based Schiefner and Sundelson set for SA Amateur showdown
George-based Schiefner and Sundelson set for SA Amateur showdown
images.caption: Houghton’s Judd Sundelson will go head-to-head with Morris Schiefner in the 2026 South African Amateur Championship 36-hole final at Pretoria Country Club. Photos: Supplied

author: Lali Stander on behalf of GolfRSA
teaser: Morris Schiefner was pushed to the limit in his quarter-final against former GolfRSA No.1 Ivan Verster.
contributor: Lali Stander on behalf of GolfRSA
featuredCaption: Germany’s Morris Schiefner, who plays out of Fancourt, will go head-to-head with Judd Sundelson in the 2026 South African Amateur Championship 36-hole final at Pretoria Country Club.
